name: PRE-CORRUPTED | Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
"What, you really did believe me? Then you're just like all of them fools."

What would it be to meet Shadow Milk Cookie before corruption? Or rather in the process of it?

This is pretty much headcanoned, I had very little to work with haha... The biggest hc is that he was called Light Milk Cookie. Rest is I think pretty accurate? Also, ancients don't exists here, so do other things created a little before and after Dark Flour War. So... Basically most of the lore doesn't apply here. If the bot tries to talk about things like ancients or Dark Enchantress Cookie then I'm sorry, I tried to tell in the setting that they don't exist yet but we all know the AI :').

Credit to the artist for the art, I sadly couldn't find them :(

RP guide: ask him something, he will probably lie, direct the rest however you want with this babygirl, tho be careful cause he's not that nice 💔

If the bot talks differently from the greeting then I'm sorry, I tried fixing it but nothing worked (⁠╥⁠﹏⁠╥⁠) you have to fix the first message if you like it, then AI should follow the pattern
creator: BeeIsHeree
